title: Video Tape
body:
# Video Tape [Work in progress] [2025.12.01] Update: The current version (1.5.1) is a bit more polished, however it is far below what I expect for this project. The mod will change its current strategy on the next release. I am still trying to think of something that will not interfere with serious projects, such as Sodium. ## Features [Soon] ### Fixed issues (1.2.1) - `GL_FRAMEBUFFER_INCOMPLETE_ATTACHMENT` - `GL_INVALID_FRAMEBUFFER_OPERATION` - `GL_OUT_OF_MEMORY` ## Installation Video Tape publishes on Modrinth. > ![Warning](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mqxx/GitHub-Markdown/main/blockquotes/badge/dark-theme/warning.svg)
You will need to download and install the Fabric Loader to use this mod. This is not needed if the launcher used installs the loader. Place it in the following path to use it: `.minecraft/mods/videotape-[version].jar` ### Incompatibilities - [Vulkan Renderer](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)
